// room script file

#sectionstart room_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function room_a (){
  // script for room: Player enters screen (before fadein)
  SetObjectClickable (0, 0);
  SetObjectClickable (1, 0);
  SetObjectClickable (2, 0);
  SetObjectClickable (3, 0);
  SetObjectClickable (4, 0);
  SetObjectView (1, 102);
  AnimateObject (1, 0, 0, 1);
  SetMusicVolume (2);
  SetMusicRepeat (1);
  PlayMusic (6);
  GUIOff (10);
  // Intro
  if (GetGlobalInt (19) ==1)
  {
    SetGlobalInt(104,1);
    PlaceCharacter (DAVE, 65, 136, DIR_RIGHT);
    ReleaseCharacterView (DAVE);
  }
  else if (GetGlobalInt (19) ==2)
  {
    SetGlobalInt(104,1);
    PlaceCharacter (DAVE, 65, 136, DIR_DOWN);
    ReleaseCharacterView (DAVE);
  }

  // if person who pushed gargoyle isn't here anymore (e.g. in dungeon) then close door
  if (GetGlobalInt (3) != NO_CHAR)
  {
    if ((GetGlobalInt (3) == GetPlayerCharacter ()) || (character [GetGlobalInt (3)].room != 3))
    {
      SetGlobalInt (3, NO_CHAR);
      SetGlobalInt (126, 2);
    }
  }
  init_object (104, 0);
  init_object (105, 2);
  init_object (126, 3);
  init_object (109, 4);
  AlarmSound ();
}
#sectionend room_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart room_d  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function room_d (){
  // script for room: First time player enters screen
  SetOwnTimer (1, 2350);
  SetOwnTimer (29, 4500);
}
#sectionend room_d  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart region1_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function region1_a (){
  // script for region1: Player walks off region
  if (GetGlobalInt (3) == GetPlayerCharacter ())
  {
    PlaySound (3);
    ObjectOff (3);
    SetGlobalInt (3, NO_CHAR);
    SetGlobalInt (126, 2);
  }
}
#sectionend region1_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart hotspot2_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function hotspot2_a (){
  // script for hotspot2: Any click on hotspot
  region1_a ();
  SetWalkTo (340, 134, DIR_UP);
  if (WalkedToLookedAt ("Hmm. It seems loose.") != 0) { }
  else if (UsedAction (A_PUSH))
  {
    if (MovedTo ())
    {
      if (GetGlobalInt (126) != 1)
      {
        PlaySound (2);
        ObjectOn (3);
        SetGlobalInt (126, 1);
      }
      SetGlobalInt (3, GetPlayerCharacter ());
    }
  }
  else Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend hotspot2_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart hotspot4_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function hotspot4_a (){
  // script for hotspot4: Any click on hotspot
  region1_a ();
  if (any_click_on_door (105, 2, 180, 125, DIR_UP, 25, 65, 136, DIR_RIGHT) == 0) Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend hotspot4_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart hotspot1_b  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function hotspot1_b (){
  // script for hotspot1: Any click on hotspot
  region1_a ();
  if (any_click_on_door (104, 0, 65, 136, DIR_LEFT, 2, 400, 100, DIR_DOWN) == 0) Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend hotspot1_b  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart hotspot3_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function hotspot3_a (){
  // script for hotspot3: Any click on hotspot
  region1_a ();
  if (any_click_on_door (109, 4, 575, 136, DIR_RIGHT, 4, 60, 136, DIR_RIGHT) == 0) Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend hotspot3_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart region2_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function region2_a (){
  // script for region2: Player walks onto region
  region1_a ();
  EnterRoom (6, 320, 133, DIR_UP);
}
#sectionend region2_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart hotspot5_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function hotspot5_a (){
  // script for hotspot5: Any click on hotspot
  region1_a ();
  SetDoorStrings ("There's no handle here!", "There's no handle here!", "");
  if (any_click_on_door_special (126, 3, 460, 125, DIR_UP, 31, 577, 43, DIR_DOWN, 2, 3, -2, 2) == 0) Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend hotspot5_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart hotspot7_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function hotspot7_a (){
  // script for hotspot7: Any click on hotspot
  region1_a ();
  if (any_click_walk_look (120, 133, DIR_UP, "It's the correct time.") == 0) Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend hotspot7_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart hotspot6_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function hotspot6_a (){
  // script for hotspot6: Any click on hotspot
  region1_a ();
  SetWalkTo (380, 133, DIR_UP);
  if (WalkedToLookedAt ("The plants look unhealthy.") == 0)
  {
    int result = UsedInvItem (39);
    if (result == 2)
    {
      PlaySound (33);
      LoseInventory (39);
      AddInventory (38);
    }
    else if (result == 0)
    { 
      result = UsedInvItem (56);
      if (result == 2)
      {
        PlaySound (33);
        LoseInventory (56);
        AddInventory (38);
      }
    }
    if (result == 0) Unhandled ();
  }
}
#sectionend hotspot6_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart hotspot9_b  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function hotspot9_b (){
  // script for hotspot9: Any click on hotspot
  region1_a ();
  SetWalkTo (225, 133, DIR_UP);
  if (WalkedToLookedAt ("The plants look unhealthy.") == 0)
  {
    int result = UsedInvItem (39);
    if (result == 2)
    {
      PlaySound (33);
      LoseInventory (39);
      AddInventory (38);
    }
    else if (result == 0)
    { 
      result = UsedInvItem (56);
      if (result == 2)
      {
        PlaySound (33);
        LoseInventory (56);
        AddInventory (38);
      }
    }
    if (result == 0) Unhandled ();
  }
}
#sectionend hotspot9_b  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart hotspot8_b  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function hotspot8_b (){
  // script for hotspot8: Any click on hotspot
  region1_a ();
  if (any_click_walk_look (260, 134, DIR_UP, "It is spooky-looking.") == 0) Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend hotspot8_b  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart hotspot10_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function hotspot10_a (){
  // script for hotspot10: Any click on hotspot
  region1_a ();
  if (any_click_walk (340, 32, DIR_UP) == 0) Unhandled ();
}
#sectionend hotspot10_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE





#sectionstart room_b  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function room_b() {
  // script for room: Player enters screen (after fadein)
  if (GetGlobalInt (19) == 1)
  {
  Wait(30);
  FaceLocation(DAVE,65,200);
  Wait(20);    
  DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"I've arranged for the occupants to be...");
  DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"...gone during our 'tour.'");
  DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"We shouldn't have any problems.");
  Wait(10);
  FaceLocation(DAVE,1, 136);
  Wait(15);
  ObjectOff(0);
  PlaySound(3);
  Wait(10);
  FaceLocation(DAVE,65, 200);
  Wait(15);
  character[EDNA].room=33;
  SetPlayerCharacter(EDNA);
  }
  
  else  if (GetGlobalInt (19) == 2)
  {
    Wait(25);
    DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"Oh. That was a 'cut-scene'.");
    DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"They let you know what's...");
    DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"...going on elsewhere in the mansion.");
    DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"All these tours make me hungry.");
    Wait(10);
    FaceLocation(DAVE,200,136);
    Wait(10);
    DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"Here's the kitchen.");
    Wait(10);
    MoveCharacterBlocking (DAVE, 180, 125, 1);
    FaceLocation(DAVE,180,1);
    Wait(5);
    ObjectOn(2);
    PlaySound(2);
    Wait(30);
    DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"I see they haven't cleaned up the, er...");
    DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"...uh, um... the mess yet.");
    Wait(15);
    FaceLocation(DAVE,180,200);
    DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"I think I just lost my appetite.");
    Wait(5);
    FaceLocation(DAVE,180,1);
    Wait(15);
    ObjectOff(2);
    PlaySound(3);
    Wait(15);
    FaceLocation(DAVE,180,200);
    Wait(15);
    DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"I know, let's go to my favorite room,");
    DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"the basement.");
    Wait(15);
    MoveCharacterBlocking (DAVE, 300, 133, 1);
    MoveCharacterBlocking (DAVE, 460, 125, 1);
    FaceLocation(DAVE,460,1);
    Wait(15);    
    DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"Oh yes, no handle.");
    Wait(15);
    FaceLocation(DAVE,460,200);
    Wait(5);
    DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"Now how did I open this door last time?");
    DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"Push it?");
    Wait(25);
    FaceLocation(DAVE,460,1);
    Wait(15);
    DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"Nope. Maybe I need a running start.");
    Wait(15);
    MoveCharacterBlocking (DAVE, 460, 144, 1);
    Wait(15);
    MoveCharacterBlocking (DAVE, 460, 125, 1);
    DisplaySpeechBackground(DAVE,"Owwwwwwwwwwwwwwwww!");
    SetCharacterView(DAVE,54);
    MoveCharacterBlocking (DAVE, 500, 130, 1); 
    MoveCharacterBlocking (DAVE, 295, 135, 1); 
    MoveCharacterBlocking (DAVE, 400, 134, 1); 
    ReleaseCharacterView(DAVE);
    FaceLocation(DAVE,400,200);    
    Wait(25);
    FaceLocation(DAVE,460,200);
    Wait(5);
    DisplaySpeech(DAVE,"Oh well, I'll let you figure it out.");
    Wait(15);
    MoveCharacterBlocking (DAVE, 575, 136, 1);
    Wait(10);
    ObjectOn(4);
    PlaySound(2);
    Wait(20);
    SetCharacterView(DAVE,105);
    Wait(15);
    StopMusic();
    NewRoom(4);
  }  
}
#sectionend room_b  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
